subject: Fw: Update to Your InterCall Conferencing Account Information
body:
Here is a new method of conferencing without having to have an operator. It's the same dial in number and passcode everytime. You don't have to make a reservation and can do it whenever you want.


-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: conferencing@intercall.com
>Sent: Aug 26, 2006 7:46 PM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: Update to Your InterCall Conferencing Account Information
>
>Our records indicate that there has been a change made to your InterCall conferencing account or that you have requested duplicate information to be sent. Your personalized account details, "how to" instructions and other information about your conferencing services are all listed below. Read on for the details! 
>
>Modifications are noted in red type 
>General Information:
>
>Owner Name: JEFFREY [updated] EPSTEIN [updated]
>
>Company Name: ESPTEIN INTERESTS
>
>Owner Number: 2591679
>
>
>Your Sales Contact: Patricia Cassidy, ,  pccassid@intercall.com
>
>Customer Service: 8003662663 or dummy
>
>
>Reservationless-Pro Account Information:
>
>Reservationless-Pro audio conferencing is available 24 hours a day 7 days a week.  Conduct a conference with up to 50 participants anytime, anywhere.
>
>Participant Code: 2127509895 [updated]
>Chairperson Code: 8666386108 [updated]
>
>
>Reservationless-Pro Toll Free Dial-In Number (US & Canada): (866) 422-9305 [updated]
> Starting an on-demand Reservationless-Pro audio conference is simple. Refer to the steps below for starting your call.
>
>1. Give your participants the date and time of the call, your Dial-In Number and your Participant Code.
>2. At the specified time, dial your Reservationless-Pro Dial-In Number.
>3. When prompted, enter your Chairperson Code followed by #.
>4. When prompted, state your name.
>5. When prompted, press *1 to begin your conference.
>
>Your participants join the conference by following steps 2 through 4 above but enter the Participant Code in place of the Chairperson Code.
>Additional Features: 
>
>? Dial out to participants directly from the call.
>? Conduct a private subconference with a selected participant.
>
>Helpful Reservationless-Pro Keypad Commands:
>
>*0Operator Assistance for Participants/Accesses Chairperson menu for Chairperson
> 
>
>*0*0Operator Assistance
> 
>
>#1Add a conference Passcode 
>
>*1Dial-out to a participant
> 
>
>#2Private Participant Count 
>
>*3Lock/Unlock Conference 
> 
>
>#4Private Roll Call  
>
>*4Activate/Deactivate Chairperson Disconnect
>
>#6Activate/Deactivate Lecture Mode
>
>
>*6Mute/Unmute individual lines
>
>#9Help Menu 
>
>*9Activate/Deactivate Entry and Exit Tones
>
>99#Disconnect all Participants (except chairperson)
>
>
>Operator Assisted Account Information:
>
>Operator Assisted service combines the professionalism of live Operator Assistance throughout your conference with the flexibility provided by our wide selection of Surround-the-Call features.
>
>Operator Assisted Toll-Free Dial-In Number (US & Canada):  (866) 356-9483 [updated]
>Reservations Number: 8003662663 or dummy
>
>Scheduling an Operator Assisted Conference:
>
>1. Schedule your reservation by calling your Reservations Number listed above. You?ll be asked to provide the following information:
>
>? Your Owner Number
>? Your name, company name, telephone, fax and email
>? Call Leader?s name
>? Date and time of the call ? including time zone
>? Expected length of the call
>? Expected number of participants
>? Any Surround-the-Call features desired
>
>2. Give your participants the date and time of the call your Conference ID Number (which will be assigned when you make your reservation) and your Dial-In Number.
>3. At the specified time, dial your Operator Assisted Dial-In Number.
>4. You will be greeted by an Operator asked to provide your Conference ID Number and placed into your conference.
>
>
>Your participants join the conference by following step 3 and 4 above and are placed into your conference or on music hold according to the specifications of your reservation.
>Additional Features:
>
>?  Schedule your Operator Assisted call with as little as 15 minutes? notice.
>?  Our wide selection of Surround-the-Call features enables you to customize each conference to meet your specific needs.
>
>Helpful Operator Assisted Keypad Commands:
>
>*0Operator Assistance for the conference 
>*5Mute/Unmute all lines except the Leader's(Leader only)
>
>*6Mute/Unmute your own line
>
>
>*7Conference Lock/Unlock (Leader only)
>Conference Place Account Information:
>
>We have provided you with a Conference Place web conferencing account ? details and login information can be found below. There is no charge associated with this account unless you chose to use the service. To learn more about Conference Place, please visit http://www.conferenceplace.com.
>Conference Place, powered by Microsoft®  Office Live Meeting, offers a flexible web conferencing solution that spans multiple applications - from small, collaborative sessions to large-scale, online events.  Whatever type of conference you need to conduct, Conference Place can make your meeting an interactive success.
>
>Conference Place URL:   http://www.conferenceplace.com
>
>Conference Place User Login: 2591679
>Conference Place Password: 004977 [updated]
>
>
>Starting or scheduling a Conference Place web conference is quick and easy.  Just follow these steps:
>
>1. Click on the URL above. Select "Start or Schedule a Meeting" from the left-hand navigation.  
>2. Enter your User Login and Password in the spaces indicated and click ?Submit?.
>3. Follow the simple steps to either ?Schedule a New Meeting? or ?Meet Now?.
>
>
>Once you've set up the details for your meeting, you can invite participants using Outlook on Windows or your Internet browser by selecting ?Invite Attendees? or ?Invite Presenters?.  Your participants will receive an email message with your conference?s time, date and access information. You can customize this invitation and include an agenda or anything else pertinent to your meeting.
>Additional Information: 
>
>? Control your Reservationless-Pro audio conference from your Conference Place window.  Play a roll call, mute and unmute lines or even dial out to participants. For instructions on using the Reservationless-Pro Audio Controls, visit http://www.conferenceplace.com/resource/AudioControlsHelp
> .
>
>? To learn more about Conference Place, visit the Resource Center at http://www.conferenceplace.com/resource .
>
>? For specialized Conference Place technical support, please call (877) 812-4520 or (706) 643-7389 or email esupport@intercall.com .
>
>We look forward to serving your conference communication needs.
>
>To update, correct or make changes to any of your general or account information listed above contact the Customer Service department at the number listed above.
>
>If you require technical support, please call Professional Services at (877) 473-3945 or (706) 634-5787 for assistance.
>Please Note: The Dial-In Number(s) for the service(s) listed may be reclaimed if they are not used for a period of 180 days.
body_html:
Here is a new method of conferencing without having to have an operator. It's the same dial in number and passcode everytime. You don't have to make a reservation and can do it whenever you want.

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: conferencing@intercall.com
Sent: Aug 26, 2006 7:46 PM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: Update to Your InterCall Conferencing Account Information

Our records indicate that there has been a change made to your InterCall conferencing account or that you have requested duplicate information to be sent. Your personalized account details, "how to" instructions and other information about your conferencing services are all listed below. Read on for the details!

Modifications are noted in red type
General Information:

Owner Name: JEFFREY [updated] EPSTEIN [updated]

Company Name: ESPTEIN INTERESTS

Owner Number: 2591679

Your Sales Contact: Patricia Cassidy, , pccassid@intercall.com

Customer Service: 8003662663 or dummy

Reservationless-Pro Account Information:

Reservationless-Pro audio conferencing is available 24 hours a day 7 days a week. Conduct a conference with up to 50 participants anytime, anywhere.

Participant Code: 2127509895 [updated]
Chairperson Code: 8666386108 [updated]

Reservationless-Pro Toll Free Dial-In Number (US & Canada): (866) 422-9305 [updated]
Starting an on-demand Reservationless-Pro audio conference is simple. Refer to the steps below for starting your call.

  1. Give your participants the date and time of the call, your Dial-In Number and your Participant Code.
  2. At the specified time, dial your Reservationless-Pro Dial-In Number.
  3. When prompted, enter your Chairperson Code followed by #.
  4. When prompted, state your name.
  5. When prompted, press *1 to begin your conference.

Your participants join the conference by following steps 2 through 4 above but enter the Participant Code in place of the Chairperson Code.
Additional Features:

? Dial out to participants directly from the call.
? Conduct a private subconference with a selected participant.

Helpful Reservationless-Pro Keypad Commands:

*0Operator Assistance for Participants/Accesses Chairperson menu for Chairperson

00Operator Assistance

#1Add a conference Passcode

*1Dial-out to a participant

#2Private Participant Count

*3Lock/Unlock Conference

#4Private Roll Call

*4Activate/Deactivate Chairperson Disconnect

#6Activate/Deactivate Lecture Mode

*6Mute/Unmute individual lines

#9Help Menu

*9Activate/Deactivate Entry and Exit Tones

99#Disconnect all Participants (except chairperson)

Operator Assisted Account Information:

Operator Assisted service combines the professionalism of live Operator Assistance throughout your conference with the flexibility provided by our wide selection of Surround-the-Call features.

Operator Assisted Toll-Free Dial-In Number (US & Canada): (866) 356-9483 [updated]
Reservations Number: 8003662663 or dummy

Scheduling an Operator Assisted Conference:

  1. Schedule your reservation by calling your Reservations Number listed above. You?ll be asked to provide the following information:

? Your Owner Number
? Your name, company name, telephone, fax and email
? Call Leader?s name
? Date and time of the call ? including time zone
? Expected length of the call
? Expected number of participants
? Any Surround-the-Call features desired

  1. Give your participants the date and time of the call your Conference ID Number (which will be assigned when you make your reservation) and your Dial-In Number.
  2. At the specified time, dial your Operator Assisted Dial-In Number.
  3. You will be greeted by an Operator asked to provide your Conference ID Number and placed into your conference.

Your participants join the conference by following step 3 and 4 above and are placed into your conference or on music hold according to the specifications of your reservation.
Additional Features:

? Schedule your Operator Assisted call with as little as 15 minutes? notice.
? Our wide selection of Surround-the-Call features enables you to customize each conference to meet your specific needs.

Helpful Operator Assisted Keypad Commands:

*0Operator Assistance for the conference
*5Mute/Unmute all lines except the Leader's(Leader only)

*6Mute/Unmute your own line

*7Conference Lock/Unlock (Leader only)
Conference Place Account Information:

We have provided you with a Conference Place web conferencing account ? details and login information can be found below. There is no charge associated with this account unless you chose to use the service. To learn more about Conference Place, please visit http://www.conferenceplace.com.
Conference Place, powered by Microsoft® Office Live Meeting, offers a flexible web conferencing solution that spans multiple applications - from small, collaborative sessions to large-scale, online events. Whatever type of conference you need to conduct, Conference Place can make your meeting an interactive success.

Conference Place URL: http://www.conferenceplace.com

Conference Place User Login: 2591679
Conference Place Password: 004977 [updated]

Starting or scheduling a Conference Place web conference is quick and easy. Just follow these steps:

  1. Click on the URL above. Select "Start or Schedule a Meeting" from the left-hand navigation.
  2. Enter your User Login and Password in the spaces indicated and click ?Submit?.
  3. Follow the simple steps to either ?Schedule a New Meeting? or ?Meet Now?.

Once you've set up the details for your meeting, you can invite participants using Outlook on Windows or your Internet browser by selecting ?Invite Attendees? or ?Invite Presenters?. Your participants will receive an email message with your conference?s time, date and access information. You can customize this invitation and include an agenda or anything else pertinent to your meeting.
Additional Information:

? Control your Reservationless-Pro audio conference from your Conference Place window. Play a roll call, mute and unmute lines or even dial out to participants. For instructions on using the Reservationless-Pro Audio Controls, visit http://www.conferenceplace.com/resource/AudioControlsHelp
.

? To learn more about Conference Place, visit the Resource Center at http://www.conferenceplace.com/resource .

? For specialized Conference Place technical support, please call (877) 812-4520 or (706) 643-7389 or email esupport@intercall.com .

We look forward to serving your conference communication needs.

To update, correct or make changes to any of your general or account information listed above contact the Customer Service department at the number listed above.

If you require technical support, please call Professional Services at (877) 473-3945 or (706) 634-5787 for assistance.
Please Note: The Dial-In Number(s) for the service(s) listed may be reclaimed if they are not used for a period of 180 days.
